paths.rollbackNote: Keep the Gin router active until gofly route responses, OpenAPI schema, metrics, and error envelope evidence match sampled production behavior.
paths.compatibilityCaveat: Middleware-specific Gin context APIs should be adapted at route boundaries before removing the original handler.

paths.rollbackNote: Keep the previous go-zero service reachable through discovery and route traffic back if generated REST/RPC shape or release checks diverge.
paths.compatibilityCaveat: goctl-style scaffold migrations must preserve public config keys and generated API/RPC entry points.

paths.rollbackNote: Restore the previous Kratos deployment target while keeping shared domain packages and service discovery registrations unchanged.
paths.compatibilityCaveat: Kratos app lifecycle and transport bootstrap code should be migrated one service boundary at a time.

paths.rollbackNote: Route latency-critical methods back to Kitex when RPC latency, streaming behavior, or IDL compatibility evidence is not yet promoted.
paths.compatibilityCaveat: Kitex remains the rollback target for latency-critical generated RPC paths until gofly RPC evidence is promoted.
